race.comment: ZOUSANITY (12) two runs back have had merit and she gets a much better set up today. Sat on the good tempo before she peaked on the run with a narrow fourth over 1200m at Tamworth in a Super Maiden. Gibbons sticks and will prove hard to run down. WILD LEGACY (11) resumes after having mixed luck in her three career starts last prep. Back with the two trials and shouldn't be a Maiden for long. Each way. DUNDEEL FLYER (8) resumes after she failed to come up last prep on the provincial circuit. Looks ready to go with the two trials and will be strong late from the wide barrier. THINK BACK (10) returns from a spell and now in the Scott Singleton yard. Yet to fire in four career runs and the latest trial win at Scone piques our interest. Keep safe. OLYMPIAN (3) well bred gelding who was safely held on debut when second over 1200m at Scone. Further improved for the this and gets another chance with Craig Williams to ride.
